title: CF_DocCentralV3_LogEvent — Power Apps V2 Trigger Input Schema
description: Input parameters for the CF_DocCentralV3_LogEvent child flow. All fields map directly to AuditLog SharePoint list columns. Pass only the fields relevant to the event being logged.

eventType.description: Type of the audit event. Must be a valid AuditLog EventType choice value.

status.description: Outcome or lifecycle status of the operation being logged.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID linking all log entries for a single flow run or operation. If empty, the flow generates a new GUID.

flowName.description: Internal name of the calling flow. Used for diagnostics.

flowRunId.description: Power Automate run ID of the calling flow run. Use workflow().run.name expression in the caller.

userEmail.description: Email address of the user who triggered the operation.

userDisplayName.description: Display name of the user who triggered the operation.

documentItemId.description: SharePoint item ID from Svi predmeti. Pass 0 if not applicable.

delovodniBroj.description: Registry number of the document being processed.

reservedNumberId.description: SharePoint item ID from RezervisaniBrojevi. Pass 0 if not applicable.

partnerId.description: SharePoint item ID from Partneri. Pass 0 if not applicable.

message.description: Human-readable description of the event. Required. Written to the AuditLog Message column (multiple lines of text).

detailsJson.description: Technical details as a JSON string. Written to DetailsJson (multiple lines of text). No length limit.

errorCode.description: Application-level error code (e.g. REGISTRY_NUMBER_GENERATION_FAILED). Max 255 chars.

errorMessage.description: Full error message from the failed action. Written to ErrorMessage (multiple lines of text). No length limit.

requestPayloadJson.description: Serialized JSON of the input payload that triggered the operation. Written to RequestPayloadJson (multiple lines of text).

responsePayloadJson.description: Serialized JSON of the response returned by the operation. Written to ResponsePayloadJson (multiple lines of text).

examples.message: Dokument nije zaveden. Greška pri kreiranju itema u Svi predmeti.
